'''faroro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnomancer|arachnomancer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnomancer|arachnomancer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| faroro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || færereth || færerej || færeresh || færere
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || farororoth || farororoj || farororosh || farororo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || faroroth || faroroj || farorosh || faroro
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || farofrofth || farofrofj || farofrofsh || farofrof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || farorotho || farorojo || farorosho || faroroko
|-
| [[Patient]] || faroroth || faroroj || farorosh || faroro
|-
| [[Possessive]] || farorothol || farorojol || faroroshol || farorokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || faroroothotho || faroroojojo || farorooshosho || farorooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || farorothon || farorojon || faroroshon || farorokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || farorothooro || farorojooro || faroroshooro || farorokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
